backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that tracks and exposes lifetime totals for footsteps, energy (Wh), and runtime (seconds) via query and update methods, with input validation using Runtime.trap.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the default ESP32 polling URL was changed to http://192.168.43.148/data in the useESP32Connection hook, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-8.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines light and dark mode OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for colors, borders, and chart palettes, plus global base styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'ESP32 Footstep Power Generator' that mounts the app at #root and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together ESP32 connection, chart data, lifetime stats, and step animation state, rendering either Dashboard or GraphScreen inside a Layout based on the active tab.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom tab bar component with Dashboard and Graphs buttons, applying an active CSS modifier to the currently selected tab.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard view rendering primary metric cards (steps, power, battery), secondary metrics (voltage, current, energy), an offline banner, a power-flow animation bar, and lifetime stats.
frontend/src/components/GraphScreen.tsx: Live charts screen that renders four Recharts LineCharts (power, steps, battery, energy) with gradient strokes, dark tooltips, and a connection status badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top app header displaying the brand title, a connection status badge, and a settings toggle button that shows or hides the SettingsPanel.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component composing Header, scrollable main content, BottomNavigation, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a metric value, unit, label, and optional icon, with accent color variants and CSS animation classes for step, charge, and power states.
frontend/src/components/SettingsPanel.ts: A settings panel component that allows users to view and update the ESP32 device URL, with save and cancel actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous access, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChartData.ts: A hook that maintains a rolling buffer (max 60 points) of time-series chart data for power, steps, battery, and energy, updated via an addDataPoint callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useESP32Connection.ts: A hook that polls an ESP32 device URL every second to fetch sensor data, manages connection status, and persists the URL to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLifetimeStats.ts: A hook that tracks cumulative footsteps, energy generated, and runtime by diffing sensor data, persists stats to localStorage, and syncs deltas to the ICP backend every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An empty placeholder module indicating that lifetime stats queries are handled directly in useLifetimeStats.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining design tokens (colors, shadows, spacing), app shell layout, header styles, and a futuristic dark/neon theme using CSS custom properties and Tailwind.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom neon colors, Orbitron/Inter fonts, neon box shadows, and oklch-based semantic color tokens, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 5) for an ESP32 Footstep Power Generator web app, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features with their IDs and requirements.
